channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quote of the day by Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella on women asking for a raise: 'It’s about knowing and having faith in the system' — a controversial gaffe that led to an immediate reversal
item.description: The technology industry has long struggled with equalising the contributions of men and women — with women vastly underpaid relative to men

item.title: Chinese firm's fiber trial hits staggering 51.3 Tb/s over 128 miles without signal regeneration — could this be an end to bandwidth bottlenecks?
item.description: YOFC demonstrated 51.3 Tb/s hollow-core transmission over 206.5 km, aiming to ease growing AI networking pressures worldwide soon significantly.
